new.name: Flowise-CVE-2025-58434-Chain-59528
new.description: FlowiseAI CVE-2025-58434 & CVE-2025-59528 exploit PoC, demonstrating unauthenticated ATO via reset token leakage, followed by authenticated RCE. Includes a reproductible Docker lab environment.

new.name: CVE-2026-48907
new.description: CVE-2026-48907 is a CVSS 10.0 pre-auth RCE in Joomla Content Editor affecting all versions ≤ 2.9.99.4. The Grayxploit team breaks down the 3-weakness chain — missing auth, no extension validation, and an unsafe upload flag — that lets attackers pop a shell in 3 HTTP requests.

new.name: By-Poloss..-..CVE-2026-12432-PoC
new.description: WP Full Stripe Free <= 8.4.3 - Missing Authorization

new.name: htb-orion-writeup
new.description: Hack The Box - Orion (Easy) | CVE-2025-32432 & CVE-2026-24061
